title: Azure MSAL Auth Schematic
description: Scaffolds a secure Angular application with Azure AD authentication using MSAL.js.

clientId.x-prompt: What is your Azure AD Application (client) ID?

tenantId.x-prompt: What is your Azure AD Directory (tenant) ID?

redirectUri.description: Redirect URI registered in your Azure AD app (e.g. http://localhost:4200/).

apiUrl.description: URL of the protected API (e.g. https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me).
apiUrl.x-prompt: What is the URL of the protected API?

apiScope.x-prompt: What API scope should be requested (e.g. user.read or api://<clientId>/access_as_user)?
